results.post_text: Last week one of the women entrepreneurs of an Artisanal Handcrafted Soaps,essential oils and Perfumery came down to meet me . Thanks to my friend who happens to be the founder's cousin. What i understood was having a great product is one thing ,GTM ,taking it to market, fitment ,PMF and acceptance is a totally different challenge. The consumers vote of approval on your product is the ultimate test of a "rubber hitting the road" a catch phrase used by my friend often. This category of Beauty and Personal Care Products what the founder built is not the FMCG- Fast moving Consumer Goods . Clarity ✨ It is always easier to sell something than Build ,earn and Reap the rewards of a Branding .She has built a range of luxury goods that rivals The Body Shop / Forest Essentials and (or) a Kiehl's Since 1851 . SWOT analysis: Lacks: 1) Visibility & digital Presence 🚫 2) Story Telling 🚫 3) Concept development 🚫 4) Brand Positioning 🚫 5) Sales Channel Strategy 🚫 6) Online presence 🚫 7) Consistent Revenues 🚫 8) 7Ps 🚫9) Brand Recall. Strengths :a) USP ✅ b) artisanal Heritage ✅ c) Craftsmanship ✅ d) Rarity ✅ e) ™️ Trademarks ✅f) Product Market Fit ✅g) High end Market presence ✅I have found explosive potential around this brand and Business model. I can't wait to apply my magic 🪄 Wand on this Brand and take it to new heights and scale Profitably.#bpc #Beauty #personalcare #luxurygoods #skincare #perfumery #essentialoils #bathoils #showergels #nature #craftsmanship #artisanal #linkedin #strategy #Businessmodel #concept… more2​​

results.author_headline: Authority Ghostwriter for Founders, Authors & Personal Brands | I Help Turn Ideas into Books & LinkedIn Content That Builds Visibility & Income | Keynote Speaker | 50+ books Ghostwritten | 15+ Founders Served | 5+ years
results.post_text: Happy Social Saturday Lovelies 😇 🥰 Before anything else, I just want to say thank you.Thank you for showing up on my posts this week. For the comments that made me smile. For the reposts I didn't expect. For the DMs It reminded me why I keep showing up at 4:30AM every single day.You have no idea how much every single one of you means to me. This community is not just followers on a screen. You are the reason building here feels worth it.Now today is not about business. It is about people.So let's do something fun.Drop your name, what you do and one person you would love to connect with on LinkedIn. Let's build together. 👇I'll go first.I'm Tusiima Glory, a Book & LinkedIn Ghostwriter.I help founders, authors and personal brands turn their story and expertise into words that build authority, visibility and real income. I would love to connect with founders, coaches and personal brands ready to be heard.Also before you scroll away...If you have been wanting to show up on LinkedIn but have no idea where to start.Precious Joshua is launching LinkedIn from Zero on the 17th of July.A Training that takes you from zero presence to landing real opportunities on LinkedIn.The waitlist is open now and the bonuses are only for early birds.👉 Join the waitlist here: https://wa.link/o1ld5jDon't sleep on this one. 🔥PS: Drop your name and what you do below. Your next opportunity might be one connection away. ❤️… more26​

Some interviews feel a little more personal than others, and this was one of them.I first came across Clovia in 2016. Back then, shopping for lingerie wasn't exactly a comfortable experience for many women. It often meant walking into a store, trying to explain your size to a male salesperson, and dealing with awkward looks and limited choices.Clovia quietly changed that, especially for women in Tier II cities. It made buying lingerie private, convenient and affordable through an online-first approach. More importantly, it brought size inclusivity and quality to a category that had long been underserved.Nearly a decade later, it's interesting to see how the brand has evolved while staying true to its original promise of making women feel comfortable, confident and joyful.I recently spoke with Soumya Kant , Co-founder and Chief Growth Officer of Clovia, about building the brand around affordability, data, omnichannel growth, Made-in-India manufacturing and, above all, the needs of Indian women.If you're interested in consumer behaviour or India's retail evolution, this conversation is worth a read.https://lnkd.in/g_vvxYkf#Interview #Retail #D2C #BrandBuilding #WomenConsumers #Ecommerce #MadeInIndia #BusinessWorld #Journalism… more‘We Built Clovia Around Joy, Affordability & Indian Women’ - BW Businessworld‘We Built Clovia Around Joy, Affordability & Indian Women’ - BW Businessworldbusinessworld.in1​​

People don't buy from logos.They buy from people they trust.The fastest-growing B2B brands today have founders who consistently share what they're building, learning, and believing.A founder's voice creates:• Trust before the first sales call• Credibility before the product demo• Conversations before outbound outreachYour company page explains what you do.Your personal brand explains why anyone should care.That's why founder-led content compounds while ads stop the moment you stop paying.If you're looking to build your founder brand consistently, see how https://lnkd.in/gjwX-HJ9 helps founders create and grow with AI.Book a demo: https://lnkd.in/gBSM7kYP#founderbranding #personalbranding #b2b #leadership… more1​​

Empowering C-suite and senior leaders to achieve strategic career transitions and global mobility with clarity and precision.Meet Dr. Azqa Shahzad (PharmD) – Founder and CEO of Career Sync Solutions (SMC Pvt. Ltd.), a multi-award-winning career strategy professional helping senior executives position themselves for leadership roles across 52+ countries, with over 1,500 professionals supported and a 4.95/5 client satisfaction rating. Recognized internationally with awards including Best Executive Career Development & Coaching CEO – APAC Insider (UK), Global Recognition Award (USA), and Women of Era Award 2025 (Pakistan). Career roles include Founder and CEO at Career Sync Solutions building a global career strategy firm serving C-suite executives; Founder & CEO at House of Freya SMC Pvt. Ltd. establishing a luxury-standard import and sourcing venture for China-to-Pakistan trade; Country Representative at Best Diplomats; Mentor at Pharmacy Mentors; and Drug Demand Reduction Professional Member at ISSUP. Her achievements span enabling professionals to articulate their value at leadership level, competing confidently in high-stakes markets, building strategic LinkedIn branding and executive resume architecture, supporting high-impact transitions across industries and international markets, and leading international youth advocacy projects with WFAD Sweden. Her expertise spans Executive Career Strategy, Leadership Positioning, LinkedIn Branding, Resume Architecture, Career Transition Strategy, Global Mobility, and Personal Brand Repositioning.We proudly recognize Dr. Azqa Shahzad for her executive career strategy expertise, global impact, and commitment to enabling leadership success across industries and borders.#CareerStrategy #ExecutiveCoaching #LeadershipPositioning #GlobalMobility #ResumeStrategy #LinkedInBranding #CareerSync #Pakistan #TheProfessionalsNetwork… more​​​

results.author_headline: Helping Founders/ Vcs/ Coaches Build Personal Brands & Get Clients on LinkedIn | Founder @BlendGrow
results.post_text: **Most founders don't have a content problem.**They have a positioning problem.They post every day.Share tips.Celebrate milestones.Still...No inbound leads.Why?Because people know **what** they do.Not **why they should choose them.**The best personal brands don't try to look smart.They make their audience feel understood.Instead of saying:"We help founders with LinkedIn."Say:"We help founders turn LinkedIn into their highest-performing client acquisition channel."One sounds like a service.The other sounds like a result.Big difference.If your content gets likes but not conversations, it's probably time to fix your positioning.… more​​​
